symbols.description: Circular sigil divided into quadrants. Contains: a crescent moon at top with vertical tree-like staff descending through center; horizontal hatched line/bar across upper portion; small stick-figure human figures on left and right; small circles; an animal figure (resembling a dog/wolf) on lower-right; a half-circle/dome shape at bottom center

Circular sigil divided into quadrants. Contains: crescent moon with vertical staff at top; a sun symbol (circle with rays) on upper-left; small stars/dots scattered; a four-legged creature (deer/animal) on lower-left; geometric shapes (diamond/rhombus with circle inside) on lower-right; a tower/dwelling shape at bottom center

Circular sigil divided into quadrants. Contains: a large sphere/orb on a pedestal at top; a vertical staff/sword descending through center; horizontal hatched line/bar; small stick-figure humans; circles and dots; a square base/altar at bottom center

Circular sigil divided into quadrants. Contains: a crescent moon with staff at top; wavy lines (water?) on left and right; a vertical staff; stick-figure humans; two rectangular tablets/scrolls with circular symbols (possibly Chinese-style coin/talisman designs) at lower-left and lower-right; a base/altar at bottom center

drawings.position: lower half, four quadrants (2x2 grid of circles)
drawings.description: Four circular hand-drawn sigils/medallions arranged in a 2x2 grid below the text. Each circle is divided by a vertical line and a horizontal hatched bar into four quadrants, reminiscent of cosmological/alchemical diagrams. Style is line-art, black ink on white background, resembling Voynich manuscript-style illustrations or esoteric/occult sigils.

mixed_media_regions.description: Two stacked circular sigils containing both symbolic drawings (moon, figures, animal, orb, tower) and labeled/textual elements in fictional script surrounding the sigil
Two stacked circular sigils containing symbolic drawings (sun, moon, stars, animal, tablets) integrated with the surrounding fictional-script text

uncertain: All textual content — the script appears to be a fictional, constructed, or encoded writing system (resembling Voynich-style or runic-influenced glyphs) that cannot be decoded or transcribed with confidence
Exact word/character counts in each text line are approximate
Identification of specific figures (human vs. animal) in the sigils is interpretive
Whether the script represents a real language, a cipher, or a purely invented system is undetermined
Possible numeric/punctuation marks mixed within the glyphs cannot be reliably distinguished
